details: The agent successfully navigated to the correct Wikipedia URL and extracted real data from the page using iterative DOM inspection. The 2023 winners (Pierre Agostini, Ferenc Krausz, Anne L'Huillier) and 2024 winners (John J. Hopfield, Geoffrey Hinton) match known facts. The 2025 data was extracted from the live page through actual browser automation with verifiable debugging steps showing the raw HTML structure. The agent reported complete laureate lists for all 3 years with citations.
